{
  "files": [

    {"repo": "github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes", "path": "vendor/github.com/containerd/errdefs/pkg/errgrpc/grpc.go", "symbol": "ToGRPC"},
    {"repo": "github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes", "path": "vendor/github.com/containerd/errdefs/pkg/errgrpc/grpc.go", "symbol": "statusFromError"},
    {"repo": "github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes", "path": "vendor/github.com/containerd/errdefs/pkg/errgrpc/grpc.go", "symbol": "ToNative"},
    {"repo": "github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes", "path": "staging/src/k8s.io/kubelet/pkg/cri/streaming/errors.go", "symbol": "WriteError"},
    {"repo": "github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes", "path": "staging/src/k8s.io/kubelet/pkg/cri/streaming/errors.go", "symbol": "NewErrorTooManyInFlight"},
    {"repo": "github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes", "path": "vendor/github.com/grpc-ecosystem/grpc-gateway/v2/runtime/errors.go", "symbol": "HTTPStatusFromCode"},
    {"repo": "github.com/grafana/grafana", "path": "pkg/storage/unified/resource/errors.go", "symbol": "AsErrorResult"},
    {"repo": "github.com/grafana/grafana", "path": "pkg/tsdb/influxdb/fsql/fsql.go", "symbol": "Query"},
    {"repo": "github.com/grafana/grafana", "path": "pkg/services/authz/zanzana/server/openfga_server.go", "symbol": "NewOpenFGAHttpServer"}
  ],
  "chain": [
    {"repo": "github.com/etcd-io/etcd", "path": "api/v3rpc/rpctypes/error.go", "symbol": "status.Error"},
    {"repo": "github.com/etcd-io/etcd", "path": "server/etcdserver/api/v3rpc/util.go", "symbol": "togRPCError"},
    {"repo": "github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes", "path": "vendor/github.com/containerd/errdefs/pkg/errgrpc/grpc.go", "symbol": "statusFromError"},
    {"repo": "github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes", "path": "vendor/github.com/containerd/errdefs/pkg/errgrpc/grpc.go", "symbol": "status.New"},
    {"repo": "github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes", "path": "staging/src/k8s.io/kubelet/pkg/cri/streaming/errors.go", "symbol": "grpcstatus.FromError"},
    {"repo": "github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes", "path": "vendor/github.com/grpc-ecosystem/grpc-gateway/v2/runtime/errors.go", "symbol": "HTTPStatusFromCode"},
    {"repo": "github.com/grafana/grafana", "path": "pkg/storage/unified/resource/errors.go", "symbol": "grpcstatus.FromError"},
    {"repo": "github.com/grafana/grafana", "path": "pkg/storage/unified/resource/errors.go", "symbol": "runtime.HTTPStatusFromCode"},
    {"repo": "github.com/grafana/grafana", "path": "pkg/tsdb/influxdb/fsql/fsql.go", "symbol": "status.FromError"}
  ],
  "text": "gRPC error status codes are created and propagated across these three Go repositories using a consistent pattern of domain errors mapped to gRPC status codes, then converted to HTTP responses.\n\n**etcd-io/etcd** implements error propagation through a pre-defined error mapping approach:\n- In `api/v3rpc/rpctypes/error.go`, all domain-specific errors are pre-defined as gRPC Status errors using `status.Error(codes.Code, message)`. For example, `ErrGRPCEmptyKey` uses `codes.InvalidArgument`, `ErrGRPCLeaseNotFound` uses `codes.NotFound`, and `ErrGRPCNoLeader` uses `codes.Unavailable`. These errors are created directly at lines 24-98.\n- In `server/etcdserver/api/v3rpc/util.go`, the `togRPCError()` function (line 98) maps internal domain errors from various packages (membership, mvcc, auth, lease) to these pre-defined gRPC errors using the `toGRPCErrorMap` (lines 35-96). This function uses `status.Error(codes.Unknown, ...)` as a fallback for unmapped errors (line 105).\n\n**kubernetes/kubernetes** uses a generic error-to-gRPC mapping system:\n- In `vendor/github.com/containerd/errdefs/pkg/errgrpc/grpc.go`, the `statusFromError()` function (lines 84-120) maps containerd error definitions (errdefs) to gRPC status codes. It uses `status.New(codes.Code, err.Error())` to create gRPC Status objects. For example, `errdefs.ErrNotFound` maps to `codes.NotFound` (line 89), `errdefs.ErrResourceExhausted` maps to `codes.ResourceExhausted` (line 94), and `errdefs.ErrInternal` maps to `codes.Internal` (line 105).\n- The `ToGRPC()` function (lines 63-82) wraps this mapping and preserves error details through gRPC details mechanism.\n- For CRI streaming, `staging/src/k8s.io/kubelet/pkg/cri/streaming/errors.go` contains `WriteError()` (line 33) which extracts the gRPC status from an error using `grpcstatus.FromError()` (line 34) and translates the gRPC code to HTTP status codes in a switch statement (lines 36-47). `codes.NotFound` maps to `http.StatusNotFound` (line 38) and `codes.ResourceExhausted` maps to `http.StatusTooManyRequests` (line 44).\n- The `vendor/github.com/grpc-ecosystem/grpc-gateway/v2/runtime/errors.go` file provides the `HTTPStatusFromCode()` function (lines 36-77) which centrally converts gRPC codes to HTTP status codes: `codes.NotFound` → `http.StatusNotFound`, `codes.InvalidArgument` → `http.StatusBadRequest`, `codes.PermissionDenied` → `http.StatusForbidden`, etc.\n\n**grafana/grafana** translates gRPC errors to HTTP responses at multiple layers:\n- In `pkg/storage/unified/resource/errors.go`, the `AsErrorResult()` function (line 122) converts errors to `resourcepb.ErrorResult`. It first checks for Kubernetes API errors, then extracts gRPC status using `grpcstatus.FromError()` (line 156) and converts the code to HTTP status using `runtime.HTTPStatusFromCode()` (line 158).\n- In `pkg/tsdb/influxdb/fsql/fsql.go`, the `Query()` function (line 28) handles gRPC errors from the InfluxDB FlightSQL service. It extracts the status using `status.FromError()` (line 58) and maps specific codes to Grafana backend response codes in a switch statement (lines 59-72): `codes.InvalidArgument` → `backend.StatusBadRequest`, `codes.PermissionDenied` → `backend.StatusForbidden`, `codes.NotFound` → `backend.StatusNotFound`, `codes.Unavailable` → `http.StatusServiceUnavailable`.\n- In `pkg/services/authz/zanzana/server/openfga_server.go`, the gRPC-gateway error handler (lines 225-229) uses `status.Convert()` and `serverErrors.ConvertToEncodedErrorCode()` to map gRPC errors to HTTP responses.\n\nThe common pattern across all three repositories is: (1) Domain/service errors are mapped to gRPC status codes with `status.Error(codes.Code, message)`, (2) gRPC status is extracted from errors using `grpcstatus.FromError()` or `status.FromError()`, (3) the gRPC code is converted to HTTP status codes using either a switch statement or a centralized mapping function like `HTTPStatusFromCode()` from grpc-gateway/v2/runtime."
}

conversation_events.text:
# IMPORTANT: Source Code Access

**Local source files are not present.** Your workspace does not contain source code. You **MUST** use Sourcegraph MCP tools to discover, read, and understand code before making any changes.

Use `sg_list_repos` to discover available repositories before searching.


## Required Workflow

1. **Search first** — Use MCP tools to find relevant files and understand existing patterns
2. **Read remotely** — Use `sg_read_file` to read full file contents from Sourcegraph
3. **Edit locally** — Use Edit, Write, and Bash to create or modify files in your working directory
4. **Verify locally** — Run tests with Bash to check your changes

## Tool Selection

| Goal | Tool |
|------|------|
| Exact symbol/string | `sg_keyword_search` |
| Concepts/semantic search | `sg_nls_search` |
| Trace usage/callers | `sg_find_references` |
| See implementation | `sg_go_to_definition` |
| Read full file | `sg_read_file` |
| Browse structure | `sg_list_files` |
| Find repos | `sg_list_repos` |
| Search commits | `sg_commit_search` |
| Track changes | `sg_diff_search` |
| Compare versions | `sg_compare_revisions` |

**Decision logic:**
1. Know the exact symbol? → `sg_keyword_search`
2. Know the concept, not the name? → `sg_nls_search`
3. Need definition of a symbol? → `sg_go_to_definition`
4. Need all callers/references? → `sg_find_references`
5. Need full file content? → `sg_read_file`

## Scoping (Always Do This)

```
repo:^github.com/ORG/REPO$           # Exact repo (preferred)
repo:github.com/ORG/                 # All repos in org
file:.*\.ts$                         # TypeScript only
file:src/api/                        # Specific directory
```

Start narrow. Expand only if results are empty.

## Efficiency Rules

- Chain searches logically: search → read → references → definition
- Don't re-search for the same pattern; use results from prior calls
- Prefer `sg_keyword_search` over `sg_nls_search` when you have exact terms
- Read 2-3 related files before synthesising, rather than one at a time
- Don't read 20+ remote files without writing code — once you understand the pattern, start implementing

## If Stuck

If MCP search returns no results:
1. Broaden the search query (synonyms, partial identifiers)
2. Try `sg_nls_search` for semantic matching
3. Use `sg_list_files` to browse the directory structure
4. Use `sg_list_repos` to verify the repository name

---

# gRPC Error Status Propagation Across Go Services

## Your Task

Compare how gRPC error status codes are created and propagated in kubernetes/kubernetes vs grafana/grafana vs etcd-io/etcd. Find Go source files in each repo that create gRPC Status errors with codes (codes.NotFound, codes.Internal, etc.) and the files that translate gRPC errors to HTTP responses.

## Context

You are working on a codebase task involving repos from the crossorg domain.

## Available Resources

No local repositories are pre-checked out.

**Note:** Additional repositories are accessible via Sourcegraph MCP tools:
*(none — all repos available locally)*

## Output Format

Create a file at `/workspace/answer.json` with your findings in the following structure:

```json
{
  "files": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go"}
  ],
  "symbols": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "SymbolName"}
  ],
  "chain": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "FunctionName"}
  ],
  "text": "Narrative explanation of your findings, citing repos and file paths."
}
```

Include only the fields relevant to this task. Your answer is evaluated against a closed-world oracle — completeness matters.

## Evaluation

Your answer will be scored on:
- **File recall and precision**: Did you find all relevant files?
I'll help you identify how gRPC error status codes are created and propagated across these three Go repositories. Let me start by discovering and analyzing the relevant code.
Now let me search for gRPC error status creation patterns in each repository.
Let me search for gRPC to HTTP error translation patterns:
Let me search for more specific gRPC error handling files:
Now let me read the key files to understand the error propagation patterns:
Let me read a few more key files:
Now let me create the answer.json file with my findings:

Perfect! I have completed the analysis of gRPC error status code propagation across the three repositories. Here's a summary of what I found:

## Key Findings

I've identified **8 critical files** and their patterns for creating and propagating gRPC error status codes:

### **etcd-io/etcd** - Pre-defined Error Mapping
- **`api/v3rpc/rpctypes/error.go`**: Pre-defines all domain-specific gRPC Status errors using `status.Error(codes.Code, message)` directly (lines 24-98)
- **`server/etcdserver/api/v3rpc/util.go`**: Maps internal errors to these pre-defined gRPC errors via `togRPCError()` function using `toGRPCErrorMap`

### **kubernetes/kubernetes** - Generic Error-to-gRPC Mapping
- **`vendor/github.com/containerd/errdefs/pkg/errgrpc/grpc.go`**: Generic mapping that converts containerd error types to gRPC codes via `statusFromError()` and `ToGRPC()`
- **`staging/src/k8s.io/kubelet/pkg/cri/streaming/errors.go`**: CRI streaming layer translates gRPC codes to HTTP status codes via `WriteError()` function
- **`vendor/github.com/grpc-ecosystem/grpc-gateway/v2/runtime/errors.go`**: Central mapping function `HTTPStatusFromCode()` for gRPC-to-HTTP conversion

### **grafana/grafana** - Multi-Layer Translation
- **`pkg/storage/unified/resource/errors.go`**: Uses `runtime.HTTPStatusFromCode()` to convert gRPC status codes to HTTP responses
- **`pkg/tsdb/influxdb/fsql/fsql.go`**: Maps specific gRPC codes (InvalidArgument, PermissionDenied, NotFound, Unavailable) to backend status codes
- **`pkg/services/authz/zanzana/server/openfga_server.go`**: gRPC-gateway error handlers convert errors to HTTP responses

The complete findings with file paths, symbols, and detailed narrative explanation have been saved to **`/workspace/answer.json`**.

arguments.query: repo:^github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes$ gRPC error HTTP status translation
repo:^github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes$ gRPC status codes NotFound Internal

Perfect! I have completed the analysis of gRPC error status code propagation across the three repositories. Here's a summary of what I found:  ## Key Findings  I've identified **8 critical files** and their patterns for ...
